title: Derive differential closure operators L1/L2 and coefficient origin
description: The differential compatibility ansatz C[A,A_spatial,S_A] = alpha1 L1[A_spatial] + alpha2 L2[A] + alpha3 S_A = 0 collapses to Delta A_spatial = q S_A. The operators L1, L2 and the coefficient ratio q = -(alpha2+alpha3)/alpha1 must be derived before gamma recovery checks. No local pre-recovery principle for q is known.
